defs: One who makes up samples for inspection; one who examines samples, or by samples; as, a wool sampler.
A pattern; a specimen; especially, a collection of needlework patterns, as letters, borders, etc., to be used as samples, or to display the skill of the worker.
quotes: Susie dear, bring your sampler and Mrs. Schumann will show you how to make that W you bothered over.
